name: The Dreamers Guards
description:
The Dreamers Guards is a high-performance, enterprise-grade anti-cheat and security framework designed for Fabric servers running Minecraft 26.1.2 and Java 25. Built for modern multiplayer environments, it combines secure client authentication, intelligent cheat detection, automated enforcement, and powerful administrative tools into a single integrated protection suite.

Every player connecting to the server is required to complete a secure authentication process through custom encrypted network packets. The verification system validates packet integrity before gameplay begins, preventing modified, missing, or tampered authentication data from being accepted. Failed authentication attempts are immediately rejected and recorded for administrative review.

The client protection module continuously validates the local Fabric environment by reading installed mod metadata directly from Fabric Loader. Loaded modifications are compared against an extensive blacklist of known cheat clients and unauthorized frameworks, including popular utilities such as Wurst, Meteor Client, LiquidBounce, and many others. After validation, the client securely reports its verification status to the server, allowing administrators to distinguish verified players from compromised clients.

Server-side verification provides detailed logging for every authentication event, including successful validations, failed handshakes, missing client installations, invalid packets, and detected modifications. Every verification result is processed in real time to ensure administrators always have complete visibility of player security status.

When an illegal modification is confirmed, the automated enforcement engine immediately creates a Flag Session. During this verification period, configurable status effects such as Darkness, Slowness, Hunger, and Poison can be applied while administrators receive continuous console notifications. Players attempting to avoid punishment by disconnecting are automatically processed by the anti-evasion system, ensuring enforcement cannot be bypassed through logout exploits.

Punishments are managed through a progressive four-stage suspension framework backed by persistent local databases. The system automatically tracks player history using dedicated suspension files, allowing penalties to escalate from temporary suspensions to permanent player and IP bans based on previous violations.

The integrated `/guards` command system provides administrators with complete real-time control over the security engine. Staff members can manually verify players, execute kicks and bans, pardon suspended players, reload configurations without restarting the server, and perform immediate enforcement actions whenever necessary. Runtime validation also protects server stability by detecting duplicate installations of The Dreamers Guards and preventing unsafe startup conditions.

Configuration management is fully automated through an intelligent migration system. Existing administrator settings are preserved across updates while newly introduced options are appended automatically. Before any migration occurs, previous configuration files are safely archived inside a rotating backup directory, minimizing the risk of accidental data loss during upgrades.

The Dreamers Guards includes native Discord webhook integration for centralized remote monitoring. Security events are delivered through rich graphical embeds containing verification results, administrative actions, player information, punishment logs, customizable thumbnails, and dynamic Minecraft player head renders. Every embed template can be fully customized through the embeds directory using configurable placeholders, while complete language localization is available through the built-in language system.

Designed with reliability, scalability, and performance as its primary goals, The Dreamers Guards delivers enterprise-level protection while maintaining minimal overhead. Its modular architecture allows server owners to secure their Fabric servers with comprehensive authentication, cheat detection, administrative automation, and detailed logging without sacrificing stability or performance.
